question: Find the maximum value of y in the equation y = 1 - 2x - 3x<sup>2</sup>
solution:
Tn=a+(nвҲ’1)d
  (nth term of an AP).

T9=5T5
a+8d=5(a+4d)вҹ№a+8d=5a+20d
5aвҲ’a+20dвҲ’8d=0вҹ№4a+12d=0
a+3d=0

question: A circle with radius 5cm has its radius increasing at the rate of 0.2m/s. What will be the corresponding increase in the area?
solution:
Area of the circle (A) = ПҖr<sup>2</sup>
dA/dr = 2ПҖr
r = 5cm
; dr/dt=0.2
dA/dt = dA/dr.dr/dt
dA/dt=2ПҖ Г— 5 Г— 0.2 = 2ПҖ

question: In the diagram above are two concentric circles of radii r and R respectively with center O. If r = 2/3R, express the area of the shaded portion in terms of ПҖ and R
solution:
r = 2/3R

вҲҙR = 3/3R

Area of small circle = ПҖr<sup>2</sup>

= ПҖ(2R/3)<sup>2</sup>

Area of the big circle ПҖr2 = ПҖ(3R/3)<sup>2</sup>


Area of shaded portion = ПҖ(3R/3)<sup>2</sup>  - ПҖ(2R/3)<sup>2</sup>

= ПҖ[(3R/3)<sup>2</sup> - (2R/3)<sup>2</sup>]

= ПҖ[(3R/3)+(2R/3) вҲ’ (3R/3) - (2R/3)]

= ПҖ[(5R/3) (R/3)]

= ПҖ x 5R/3 x R3


= 5/9ПҖR<sup>2</sup>

question: In a school, 220 students offer Biology or Mathematics or both. 125 offer Biology and 110 mathematics. How many offer Biology but not Mathematics?
solution:
Hint: Represent the question in a venn diagram, such that
n(B вҲ© M) = x
n(B) only = 125-x
n(M) only = 110-x
=> 125-x + 110-x + x = 220
=> x = 15.

n(B) only = 125 - 15 = 110

question: If tan Оё = 4/3, calculate sin<sup>2</sup> Оё - cos<sup>2</sup> Оё.
solution:
tan Оё = opposite/adjacent = 4/3
 
Hyp<sup>2</sup> = 4<sup>2</sup>
 + 3<sup>2</sup>
Hyp = 5.

sin Оё = 4/5; cos Оё = 3/5
sin<sup>2</sup>Оё вҲ’ cos<sup>2</sup>Оё = 16/25 вҲ’9/25
= 7/25

question: ake r subject of the formula given that x/r+a = a/r
solution:
x/r+a = a/r
 
вҹ№ rx = ar + a<sub>2</sub>
rx вҲ’ ra = a<sub>2</sub> вҹ№ r = a<sub>2</sub>/ (xвҲ’a)
